commit_message:
wb_intercon_gen instantiation template wb_intercon_gen instantiation template The following changes since commit 2d7ab8e54bec5656735e04054c03669833defaf4:

  wb_intercon: Add wb_intercon generator (2013-09-18 11:38:52 +0200)

are available in the git repository at:

  https://github.com/skristiansson/orpsoc-cores.git for-openrisc

for you to fetch changes up to bbf235ac205e456be15c37407b676d464de32724:

  or1200-generic: use wb_intercon_gen template header file (2013-09-19 09:33:37 +0300)

---

wb_intercon_gen instantiation template wb_intercon_gen instantiation template The following changes since commit 2d7ab8e54bec5656735e04054c03669833defaf4:

  wb_intercon: Add wb_intercon generator (2013-09-18 11:38:52 +0200)

are available in the git repository at:

  https://github.com/skristiansson/orpsoc-cores.git for-openrisc

for you to fetch changes up to bbf235ac205e456be15c37407b676d464de32724:

examples.patch:
@@ -69,14 +69,14 @@ def add(self, obj):
             raise Exception("Invalid type!" + str(obj))
 
     def write(self, file=None):
-        s = "module {name}\n".format(name=self.name)
-
+        s = ""
         if self.ports:
+            s += "module {name}\n".format(name=self.name)
             max_len = max([len(p.range()) for p in self.ports])
             s += '   ('
             s += ',\n    '.join([p.write(max_len) for p in self.ports])
             s += ')'
-        s += ';\n\n'
+            s += ';\n\n'
         if self.wires:
             max_len = max([len(w.range()) for w in self.wires])
             for w in self.wires:
@@ -85,7 +85,8 @@ def write(self, file=None):
         for i in self.instances:
             s += i.write()
             s += '\n'
-        s += 'endmodule\n'
+        if self.ports:
+            s += 'endmodule\n'
         if file is None:
             return s
         else:
